headline: Trump 🍊💥 BOMBS Iran 💣, Hormuz Block Party 🚫🛳️ Goes NUCLEAR ☢️🔥
text: DJT 🍊👑 just DROPPED the MIC 🎤💥 on IRAN 🤯 saying 'RETURN TO TALKS 🗣️ OR I BOMB YOUR BRIDGES 🌉⚡ AND POWER PLANTS 🏭🔌 NEXT WEEK 😤'! Iran’s Revolutionary Guards 🛡️😡 fired back BLOCKING Strait of Hormuz 🚫🛳️ 'TIL US STOPS AGGRESSION 💥' and promised to CHOKE other oil & gas routes 🛢️😈 like a WWE HEEL TURN 🥊! US Centcom 🪖🚀 just SLAMMED Iran with drone/air/navy STRIKES on coastal defenses 🏝️💣 and cruise-missile spots on Greater Tunb Island 🏝️🎯, degrading their shipping-attack game 🎮📉! Oil prices 🚀📈 went BRRRRR as tankers stalled like rush-hour traffic 🚗💨! Trump told Bret Baier 📺🗣️ he'd save 'energy targets' for LAST but still hit 'em MASSIVE if needed 💥💪, swapping 20% tolls for Gulf mega-deals 🤑🤝! IRGC warned 'EXPECT MORE CLOSURES' 🛑🛢️ while Iran’s state TV 📺 claimed separate attacks on US targets in Jordan 🇯🇴, Kuwait 🇰🇼, Bahrain 🇧🇭 – US allies just SWATTED drones like flies 🪰💥! Trump retreat on tolls screams 'STRUGGLING TO END THIS WAR' 😩🕊️, UN rights chief called bombing civilians a WAR CRIME ⚖️😱, and the whole thing’s a FAULTLINE exposing the WEAK US-Iran deal 🤝💔! IRAN SAID BLOCK MORE TRADE ROUTES 🛣️🚫, US SAID FRESH STRIKES 💥, oil goes SKY-HIGH 📈🔥 and the Middle East is LIT AF 🎇🌍 – y’all better buckle up for this geopolitical ROAST 🔥🍿!
